display.purpose: Hero h1 only — the single boldest statement on the page.

label.purpose: Hero eyebrow only — not repeated on other sections.

shadows.name: ambient-sm
shadows.purpose: Resting state for cards, mockup tiles, scrolled header.

shadows.name: ambient-md
shadows.purpose: Hover state for cards, FAQ items, hero badge.

shadows.name: ambient-lg
shadows.purpose: Hero mockup frame — the page's focal point.

shadows.name: pine-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button resting shadow, tinted with brand color.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover, scroll-reveal, and transition states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA button — 'Get my free mockup' / 'Book a free call'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; background: #1f5f3f; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(31, 95, 63, 0.25); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #143f29; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(31, 95, 63, 0.32); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1f5f3f; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA — used alongside the primary button (e.g. 'See pricing').
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-block; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; background: transparent; color: #1f5f3f; border: 2px solid #1f5f3f; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #1f5f3f; color: #ffffff; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(31, 95, 63, 0.18); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1f5f3f; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Solution Card
components.description: Capability card with icon tile, title, and description.
components.html:
Built To Convert

A fast, mobile-first site designed to turn visitors into booked jobs.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e3e8e4; border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px; text-align: center; transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(28, 43, 58, 0.08); border-color: transparent; } .ds-icon-tile { width: 64px; height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 16px; border-radius: 16px; background: #f6f8f6; color: #1f5f3f; } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 12px; color: #1c2b3a; } .ds-card p { color: #6b7280; margin: 0; }

components.name: Featured Pricing Card
components.description: The highlighted (most popular) pricing tier — permanently elevated with a pine-tinted gradient.
components.html:
Most Popular

Growth

$147

Everything in Starter, plus local SEO setup and a contact form.

Get My Free Mockup
components.css: .ds-card-featured { border: 1px solid #1f5f3f; border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(31, 95, 63, 0.04), #ffffff 40%); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(31, 95, 63, 0.12); transform: translateY(-8px); transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-card-featured:hover { transform: translateY(-12px); box-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(31, 95, 63, 0.18); } .ds-card-featured h3 { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #1c2b3a; } .ds-price { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1f5f3f; margin: 0; } .ds-card-featured p:not(.ds-price) { color: #6b7280; flex-grow: 1; margin: 0; } .ds-badge { position: absolute; top: -14px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: #f2a93b; color: #ffffff; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-btn-primary { margin-top: auto; display: inline-block; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; background: #1f5f3f; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(31, 95, 63, 0.25); }

components.name: Stat Callout
components.description: Horizontal stat highlight with icon tile — replaces the side-stripe callout pattern.
components.html: 73% of customers check a business's website before calling.
components.css: .ds-stat-callout { margin-top: 24px; background: #f6f8f6; padding: 18px 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #1c2b3a; border-radius: 10px; text-align: left; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; } .ds-stat-icon { flex-shrink: 0; color: #1f5f3f; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; padding: 8px; display: flex; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(28, 43, 58, 0.06); }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky header with blur backdrop, logo, links, and CTA. Gains shadow on scroll.
components.html:
Buckeye Web Co.
PricingProcessFAQ
Get My Free Mockup
components.css: .ds-header { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid #e3e8e4; } .ds-header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 24px; } .ds-logo { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.4rem; color: #1f5f3f; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-links a { color: #2a2f33; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #1f5f3f; } .ds-nav-links a:focus-visible, .ds-logo:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1f5f3f; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; background: #1f5f3f; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(31, 95, 63, 0.25); }

components.name: FAQ Item
components.html:
Do I need to manage anything on my Google account?

No — everything runs on our infrastructure. You never have to log into or change anything on your Google Business account.
components.css: .ds-faq-item { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e3e8e4; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px 20px; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-faq-item:hover { border-color: #1f5f3f; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(28, 43, 58, 0.06); } .ds-faq-item summary { font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; list-style: none; position: relative; padding-right: 24px; color: #2a2f33; } .ds-faq-item summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .ds-faq-item summary::after { content: '+'; position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #1f5f3f; } .ds-faq-item[open] summary::after { content: '\2212'; } .ds-faq-item p { margin-top: 12px; color: #6b7280; } .ds-faq-item summary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1f5f3f; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

narrative.overview: Buckeye Web Co. should feel like the work of a small, sharp local outfit — the kind of operator a landscaping business owner already trusts to show up, do clean work, and not waste their time. The system pairs confident, generously-spaced Poppins headlines with calm Inter body text, set against soft sage-tinted neutrals and a single deep pine green that carries the brand. Pops of marigold orange mark the one thing that matters on any given screen: the call to action. This system explicitly rejects the generic AI/SaaS-startup look: no cream or beige 'parchment' backgrounds, no gradient text, no tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows stacked above every section, no identical three-card grids repeated section after section, no colored side-stripe borders on callouts, and no stock hero-metric templates. Every section should read as deliberately composed for this business, not assembled from a template library.
keyCharacteristics: Deep pine green as the singular brand color, used sparingly and with intent
Soft sage-neutral backgrounds (morning mist) alternating with white to create rhythm without borders
Poppins for headlines (confident, geometric, slightly rounded), Inter for body (calm, legible)
Layered, soft shadows rather than hard borders to convey depth
Marigold orange reserved almost exclusively for primary CTAs and key accents

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Marigold (#f2a93b) appears in at most 2-3 places per page. If a page has more than one marigold element competing for attention, remove one.

rules.name: The One Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels are a hero-only device. No other section gets one — repeating it everywhere is the generic-template tell this system explicitly avoids.

rules.name: The Lift-on-Hover Rule
rules.body: Every interactive card or button increases its shadow depth and translates up 2-6px on hover/focus. A static card with no hover state feels unfinished in this system.

dos: Do alternate section backgrounds between white and morning-mist (#f6f8f6) to create rhythm without adding borders or dividers.

Do vary section layout structure — grids, horizontal splits, centered single-column, stat callouts — so no two consecutive sections share the same shape (per PRODUCT.md Design Principle 3: "Vary section rhythm").
Do use marigold (#f2a93b) only for the hero badge, mockup CTA, and pricing "most popular" badge — 2-3 instances per page maximum.
Do give every interactive element (cards, buttons, FAQ items, nav links) a hover and :focus-visible state with a 2px pine outline.
Do use inline SVG icons (wrench, shield, chart, star, checkmark) at 24px in pine or white — never emoji.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: scroll-reveal, float, and hover-lift animations must have a reduced/instant alternative.
donts: Don't use cream, beige, or parchment body backgrounds — the neutral palette is sage-tinted white/morning-mist only.
Don't use gradient text anywhere, including headings or stat numbers.
Don't stack a tiny uppercase tracked "eyebrow" label above every section — it's a hero-only device (The One Eyebrow Rule).
Don't repeat an identical three-card grid in consecutive sections (e.g., Solution → Pricing → Process all as 3-up grids back to back). Each section earns its own structure.
Don't use a colored left-border stripe on callouts — the stat callout uses an icon tile + flex row instead.
Don't use stock "hero metric" templates (giant number + label in a box) — outcomes should be shown through copy and the mockup visual, not a metrics dashboard aesthetic.
Don't use any border heavier than 1px, or any border color other than hairline sage (#e3e8e4) or pine (#1f5f3f) for featured/hover states.
